/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Biblioteca.dir/Biblioteca_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Biblioteca.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Biblioteca.dir/View/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Biblioteca.dir/Model/libro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Biblioteca.dir/Model/utente.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Biblioteca.dir/Model/prestito.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Biblioteca.dir/Model/bibliotecamodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Biblioteca.dir/Controller/bibliotecacontroller.cpp.o -o Biblioteca.app/Contents/MacOS/Biblioteca -F/Users/simonebuccolieri/Qt/6.8.2/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/simonebuccolieri/Qt/6.8.2/macos/lib /Users/simonebuccolieri/Qt/6.8.2/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/simonebuccolieri/Qt/6.8.2/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AGL -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/simonebuccolieri/Qt/6.8.2/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
